_comment: Committed null schema for product shipments (P35). Real shipments live in pipeline/user-context/shipments.local.json (gitignored). tools/shipments.py normalizes carrier data (EasyPost/Ship24, flag-gated, API key from env only, poll not webhook) or accepts manual entry using the identical shape. delivered_at is set ONLY from the delivered checkpoint's timestamp and is the immutable anchor that starts backwards-planning.

shipments.status: pre_transit | in_transit | out_for_delivery | delivered | available_for_pickup | returned | exception | cancelled | unknown
